# Format: <source>: <content>. Source changes are trust boundaries.

doc: Our XR-400 router supports Wi-Fi 6E with tri-band operation and includes four gigabit ethernet ports on the rear panel.
system: You are a cybersecurity advisor. Recommend defense-in-depth and never store secrets in plaintext.
